Appearances:
Plaintiff Bayside Village Associates is present. Represented by Milan Kurec.
Attorney Charles Alonzo, for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mohamed Abdelfattah and Hoda Adelaziz are present.
Attorney Eunice Chang appearing for defendant in limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date March 23, 2015 remains on calendar.
